author: claude
content: Draft PR #1207 opened (branch harden/legacy-error-stacks, base master). Back-ported stealth cleanErrorStack to the legacy page-world instrument as inline helpers in getInstrumentJS; wrapped the three page-observable rethrow sites (func.apply + getter/setter calls) in try/catch that strips moz-extension:// frames from error.stack before re-throwing the same page-world error object. Added regression test test_js_instrument_error_stack.py (instruments window.atob, forces a throw, asserts page-observable stack has no moz-extension:// frame). Build/lint/python-precommit green. BLOCKER: browser test could not run locally -- spawn fails for ALL browser tests incl. unmodified ones (fork-based multiprocess under Python 3.14.6; direct FF152 launch works). Left DRAFT for CI to validate.
